三年前，规则怪谈降临，开启国运游戏。
每个月随机从一些国家抽取天选者进入怪谈世界闯关。
成功通关，则获得丰厚奖励
失败，天选者死亡，怪谈降临国家
夏国，已经经历四次失败，泱泱大夏，岌岌可危。
……
白夜，一名普通高中生，刚成年的他，这一次代表夏国挑战怪谈世界。
随着一个个副本的通关，他发现自己身上似乎藏着天大的秘密！
他的身份，他生活的世界，还有他最亲近的人，一个接一个的秘密等着他去揭开……
规则怪谈，到底是救赎，还是深渊？
……
四口之家
规则一：这里是四口之家，家里有你，爸妈，和奶奶，没有其他人。
规则二：妈妈喜欢听话的孩子，不要违背她的任何话语。
规则三：爸爸脾气不好，不要轻易招惹他，如果不小心惹到了，可以找妈妈。
规则四：你身体不好，需要按时吃药，明天早上吃一次，如果药没了，记得提醒妈妈买药。
规则五：无论什么时候，不要让爸爸进入你的房间。
……
规则八：七天之后，你会死。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/2e4412b7377168ba27cbf098d145d85c","author":"一只史莱姆","author_id":"","book_id":"7206325600309480482","book_name":"规则怪谈，诡异？都是一家人","book_short_name":"诡异之家","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":496,"name":"国运","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=496&name=国运&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":851,"name":"规则怪谈","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=851&name=规则怪谈&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":537,"name":"惊悚游戏","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=537&name=惊悚游戏&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7207677097974694452","read_count":"22996","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"947155"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.5","serial_count":"312","tags":"悬疑脑洞,直播,灵异,无女主,国运,规则怪谈,悬疑,惊悚游戏","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1b7a040439b75c3bc8b5ede7bc2490c3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779449894&x-signature=zq0TDHWJQYN6w%2FF1pcKewk8bq%2B4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2075487123028976","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.760215e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323193814DDFBD36F040234B3FF55"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":67,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":7760,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":61823},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7255163770769752843","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书真的是我看过这种类型最好的，天呐，看完这些，我感觉其他的都是垃圾，都不能看了。作者，你真的是太牛了！剧情也很好，人物设定也很好，结尾感觉稍微有一点点不太一样，但也很好，真的是反转，反转再反转，但是就是感觉像是早就已经注定了，把人心也写的十分，怎么说呢，相信大家都懂，我就不说了。总而言之，大家必须看啊，还有比这更好看的吗？这显然是没有了，已经天花板了。有句话叫做，只有我才能打败我。期待作者在创佳绩，再写一本佳作。一本真的不够看，写的太好了，把我的阅读水准都提高了，对吧，你都已经这样了，我都看了，还能再看别人写的书吗？作者加油，再写一部好书，提前恭喜。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1689224528,"group_id":"7206325600309480482","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我是新手，如果有不好的地方，请见谅。是学生，不能及时更新。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3Iw78Qmg5nPD12Gl2Uj/ccfPlK94ENl1ZZRz+R4R8yn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/7b13c77336b84d659690ac97a91e6b3f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788477&x-signature=%2BHFZbWpBBD0%2FcZub5RkMUj8L5eY%3D","user_id":"1121157208619847","user_name":"水无欢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1121157208619847","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end 难得的有描写其他优秀的天选者，有本国有他国的，其它的天赋也有不少很棒的，其他的天选者也并不是除了附庸就是反派龙套，很真实，对男主特别优秀的天赋等级也有说明。","text_exts":[{"e":33,"s":29,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177426589434B3FF55%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227238263875623453475%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227206325600309480482%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1685289788,"group_id":"7206325600309480482","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"俗世谈欢书可就","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1wKQrrrOo0D5mIYxRJqx3Ck1MwCr+VZ1jHJbWntqRFu","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/6187e4cee56d4db49997fa7f3fde9e89~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776790072&x-signature=D6sZdcWlvl2ZRAV9bz%2FCROFITsY%3D","user_id":"1293505240765870","user_name":"想饮一些酒"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1293505240765870","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7206325600309480482","book_info":{"abstract":"【规则怪谈+国运+无CP+直播+原创副本+小惊悚+温馨治愈】
